channel.title: Entertainment
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Entertainment, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: James Van Der Beek Secured Down Payment for Family’s Texas Ranch with Help from Friends Before His Death: Rep
item.description: The late ‘Dawson’s Creek’ actor and his family relocated from Beverly Hills, Calif., to the Austin property in 2020

item.title: Cardi B Falls Off Chair Mid-Concert, Jokes ‘That Was the Government’ After Heated Online Exchange with Homeland Security
item.description: “Can someone put a community note on this … this video is clearly AI,” Cardi quipped while reposting a clip of the incident

item.title: No Arrests Made in Nancy Guthrie Kidnapping Case After Police Swarmed Home Near Abduction Site
item.description: Authorities executed a court-ordered search warrant at the residence “based on a lead we received" on Feb. 13, police said

item.title: Who Is Olympic Hockey Player Charlie McAvoy’s Wife? All About Kiley McAvoy
item.description: Charlie McAvoy is being coached by his wife's dad at the 2026 Winter Olympics

item.title: Lisa Rinna ‘Doesn't Think’ Her Daughters Have Seen “Days of Our Lives,” 'Nor Do They Care' to
item.description: The actress said her daughters have seen some of her work on 'The Real Housewives,' but not from her early days in television

item.title: Bianca Censori Heads to Spa Ahead of Valentine's Day
item.description: Bianca Censori will look picture-perfect for her hubby Kanye West for Valentine's Day -- 'cause she was out getting a spa touch-up the day before! Che...

item.title: Travis Kelce's Podcast Account Posts Valentine's Day Card Referencing Taylor Swift's 'Wood'
item.description: Travis Kelce's love was the key that opened Taylor Swift's thighs ... and he's looking to pass that on this Valentine's Day in the form of a virtual c...

item.title: Rihanna Accidentally Flashes Butt While Walking into A$AP Rocky's Fashion Show
item.description: Rihanna went to support A$AP Rocky's fashion pursuits ... but her outfit gained the most attention when she accidentally flashed her backside. The sin...

item.title: Canadian Curler Cusses Out Swedish Opponent After Cheating Accusations, Video
item.description: Canadians might generally be known for their polite manners, but those apparently didn't travel with one curling competitor to Milan for the Winter Ol...

item.title: Justina Valentine Fire-Hot Snaps to Celebrate Her 39th Birthday
item.description: Justina Valentine is 39 and looking great ... and if you need receipts, this gallery’s got 'em! The birthday babe knows exactly how to crank up the he...
